input.background: According to Variety (Aug. 10, 2010), the average age of viewers of television programs broadcast on CBS, NBC, and ABC is 51 years. A rival network executive hypothesizes that the average age of FOX viewers is less than 51. To test her hypothesis, she samples 200 FOX viewers and determines the age of each.
input.question: Describe the population.

output.answer: The population is the set of units of interest to the TV executive, which is the set of all FOX viewers.

meta_info.caption: Key Elements of a Statistical Problem-Ages of TV Viewers
